title: origin tech leader Uday Ruddaraju is new CTO, Compute at OpenAI
description: Ruddaraju was among the key xAI employees who joined rival OpenAI last year amid increasing competition for talent and resources between major companies in the Artificial Intelligence sector.
content:

title: AI detection not automatically better for colorectal cancer screening in Lynch syndrome, study shows
description: People with Lynch syndrome, the most common hereditary predisposition to colorectal cancer, face a markedly increased cancer risk and therefore undergo regular colonoscopies. Researchers from the University Hospital Bonn (UKB), the University of Bonn, the University of Leipzig, and Amsterdam UMC investigated whether artificial intelligence improves the detection of precancerous lesions. Their findings show that, in specialized centers, AI provided no significant additional benefit. The study was published in The Lancet Gastroenterology & Hepatology.
content: People with Lynch syndrome, the most common hereditary predisposition to colorectal cancer, face a markedly increased cancer risk and therefore undergo regular colonoscopies. Researchers from the University Hospital Bonn (UKB), the University of Bonn... [3804 chars]

title: China's DeepSeek to raise fresh capital at $74 billion valuation ahead of onshore IPO, sources say

title: Boone County Sheriff's Office warns residents after AI swatting call
description: A scam that makes people believe their loved ones are in danger using artificial intelligence has hit Boone County, and the sheriff's office is warning people after a resident reported a call. According to a Facebook post, the Boone County Sheriff's Office said the victim received a call Friday that showed their daughter's contact name and number. The caller allegedly had the daughter’s voice and told the victim she had been kidnapped at gunpoint before another voice demanded money, essentially asking for a ransom.
content:
